scripts.check:migration-policy: node -e "if(['staging','production','prod'].includes((process.env.APP_ENV||process.env.NODE_ENV||'').toLowerCase())){console.error('Migration policy violation: drizzle push is forbidden in promoted environments. Use checked-in migrations with pnpm --filter @workspace/db run migrate.');process.exit(1)}console.log('Migration policy check passed for demo/dev environment.');"
